response.overview: Servando is a humble man living in a small town, known for his kindness and willingness to help others despite his poverty. However, his generosity is taken for granted by those closest to him — his wife despises his simple life, and his cousins betray him out of ambition.  Everything begins to change when he reconnects with Kiko, a successful childhood friend who offers him an opportunity to work for a respected businessman. In this new environment, Servando faces distrust and prejudice, but his honesty and dedication slowly earn him respect.  As he rises within the company, those who once ignored him return with hidden intentions. Faced with past betrayals, Servando must choose between resentment and forgiveness.  A story of resilience and redemption, where humility and integrity prove stronger than ambition and betrayal.
response.title: El Malo
